# HomeCost Canada

> An Ontario 2026 tax, home-affordability and total home-cost planner. Answer a
> few grouped questions and get your take-home pay, the home price you'd qualify
> for, a down-payment timeline, and the full monthly cost of a target home.

## Facts
- Run locally: `npm install && npm run dev` (http://localhost:3000)
- Verify: `npm run check` — lint, types, 108 tests, production build
- Stack: Next.js 16 · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind · Zod · Recharts
- Coverage: Federal + Ontario 2026 figures — CPP/CPP2, EI, surtax, health premium
- Scope: income tax, corporate tax, affordability (GDS/TDS + stress test),
  down-payment plan, mortgage amortization, two-scenario compare
- Licence: MIT
- Status: educational demonstration — not financial, tax, or mortgage advice

## Notes
- One Zod schema validates every input on both the client and the server.
- All figures shown in marketing screenshots use an illustrative demo profile.

## Links
- Author: Anuj Raja <anujrajaceo@gmail.com>
- Website: https://anujraja.com
